style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails shimmer with pastel pink and lavender hues, drifting lazily upward like fairy wings. A soft ethereal glow emanates from Psyduck's body in a delicate petal-shaped aura, refracting light into delicate rainbows. The atmosphere is bathed in a warm, inviting golden-white luminescence, with faint musical note vibrations creating subtle ripples in the air. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
